rows.notes: Selected 'Vana' based on visual verification of the image, overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Varia'. Both extractors correctly identified the row as a header with no monetary amounts.

Selected gpt-5-mini's more complete description '1765 Decbr 8' as it accurately captures both lines of the date header from the left margin, overriding gemini-flash's partial '1765.'. Both correctly identified it as a header with no monetary amounts.

rows.description: Gave Sr. Dixon a subscription towards Printing the Scriptures in the Mancks Language. Mancks set & half Man
rows.notes: Amounts (2 2 0) were agreed by both extractors. The description was constructed by combining the best parts from both, and visual verification: 'Sr.' from gemini-flash (overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Dr.'), excluding 'Decbr 8.' from gemini-flash (which belongs to the previous header), and including gemini-flash's full clarifying note 'Mancks set & half Man' (which gpt-5-mini missed).
rows.english_description: Subscription paid to Sir Dixon towards printing the Scriptures in the Manx language.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription paid to Sir Dixon towards printing the Scriptures in the Manx language, amounting to £2 2s 0d.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirmed the amounts to be 1 pound, 1 shilling, 11 pence, overriding both extractors. gemini-flash had 1 1 1, while gpt-5-mini had 11 1 11. The '11' in the pence column is clearly visible in the image.
